Hi! I dont think weve met. Im Ellen Carter. Nice to meet you.
Nice to meet you too, Ellen. Im Marcos Mansour. I work as an appraisal engineer.
Great to meet a fellow appraiser! Which company do you work for?
Im a partner in my own company. Were based in São Paulo, and Im in charge of the valuation team.
Thats impressive. Im based in Chicago, and I work in the same field. What brings you to the congress?
Im here for the talks and for some networking. Id love to meet more colleagues from the United States.
Same here! Lets stay in touch. Here is my business card.
Thank you, Ellen. Here is mine. Lets get in touch after the congress.
Hi, Im Marcos Mansour. Nice to meet you.
I am a partner, and I am in charge of the valuation team.
Our company is based in São Paulo, Brazil.
It was great meeting you. Lets get in touch.

Good morning, everyone, and welcome to the International Valuation Congress here in Washington. My name is Helen, and I am one of the event hosts. The opening session starts at ten o'clock in the main hall. Throughout the day, we have talks on appraisal standards, the global market, and new technology in the field. Many appraisers and partners from across the Americas are here today. Please introduce yourself to new people, share your business card, and build new connections. If you need any help, our team is at the front desk. Have a wonderful congress.
